name: agent-maintained-site
description: Blueprint + hardened building blocks for a self-updating, agent-maintained content site.
comment: This is a blueprint, not a turnkey app. Add your own static-site generator (Astro/Eleventy/etc.) and its build/deploy scripts. The scripts below are the reusable, hardened pieces; see ARCHITECTURE.md. Keep .nvmrc's exact pin at or above the engines floor.
